title: ZSS Jajpur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 13 BPM, Medical Officer and More Posts
short_info: Zilla Swasthya Samiti Jajpur (ZSS Jajpur) has released the official BPM, Medical Officer and More Notification 2026 on 26 May 2026 at the official website http://jajpur.odisha.gov.in. A total of 13 vacancies have been announced under the ZSS Jajpur Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with qualifications as mentioned in the official notification can apply offline until 09 June 2026. The official notification PDF and offline application form link are available below.

qualification.details: Please refer to the official notification for specific qualification details.

salary_details.details: Block Program Manager (BPM): As per Society Norm Case Registry Assistant (CRA): As per Society Norm Pediatrician, DEIC: Rs.1,06,379/-+ PI Medical Officer, DEIC:Rs.85,103/-+ PI Medical Officer, SNCU: Rs.85,103/-+ PI Medical Officer (Ayush, Collocated): As per Society Norm Medical Officer (RBSK): As per Society Norm Senior TB Lab. Supervisor (NTEP): As per Society Norm

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ZSS Jajpur Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://jajpur.odisha.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
